To match AuthorityKeyIdentifier of cert extensions in DER encoding: [Rule] null : Do not match. NOT null : match if it is equal with [AuthorityKeyIdentifier of cert extensions] in DER encoding

To match BaseConstraints.pathLenConstraint of cert extensions: [Rule] >=0 : The certificate must contain BaseConstraints extension, and the cA field in the extension takes. -2 : The cA field in the BaseConstraints extension of the certificate must be set to false or the certificate does not contain BaseConstraints extension. other : Do not match.

To match the issuer of cert: [Rule] null : Do not match. NOT null : match if it is equal with [issuer of cert] in DER encoding.

To match the ExtendedKeyUsage of cert extensions: [Rule] null : Do not match. NOT null : match ok if [ExtendedKeyUsage of cert extensions] is null, or [ExtendedKeyUsage of cert extensions] include [extendedKeyUsage].
